description: Navigate to The Fifteen Game activity in GCompris, advance to Level 3 (the 4x4 numbered tile puzzle), and solve it by sliding tiles until all numbers 1-15 are arranged in order left-to-right, top-to-bottom, with the blank space in the bottom-right corner. Once the congratulations animation appears, save a screenshot of the solved puzzle to ~/Documents/fifteen_solved.png.

metadata.navigation_path: Main Menu > Computer Discovery (penguin) > Logic tab > scroll down > The fifteen game
